description_long: This is a medium-sized memorial obelisk set within a circular stone-bordered plot, surrounded by gravel and small shrubs. The obelisk is constructed from dark stone with a rectangular cross-section and features a lighter stone block at the top, which is engraved with a circular motif. The front face of the obelisk displays a vertical inscription in white, while the base is square and slightly raised above the gravel. Floral arrangements and small bushes are placed at the base, adding a commemorative touch. The overall design is solemn and formal, suitable for a memorial or commemorative setting in a park or cemetery.
description: A dark stone memorial obelisk with a light stone cap, inscribed front, and surrounded by gravel, shrubs, and flowers within a circular stone border.
description_view_0: Front view showing the inscribed face, floral arrangements, and the circular motif on the capstone.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain back of the obelisk and the arrangement of shrubs around the base.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the obelisk's depth, the inscription partially visible, and a single shrub in the foreground.
description_view_3: Side/rear view showing the square base, the capstone's motif, and the symmetrical placement of shrubs.
attribute_inscription: Vertical white text inscription on the front face, in German, legible and formal, with additional smaller text on a plaque at the base.
attribute_ornamentation: Circular engraved motif on the front face of the light stone cap; otherwise, no additional ornamentation.
attribute_base_design: Square, slightly raised stone base, bordered by gravel and encircled by a low stone curb; base is simple and functional.
attribute_tip_design: Flat, rectangular light stone cap with a circular engraved motif on the front face; smooth finish, no pointed tip.
attribute_surrounding_features: Circular stone border, gravel ground cover, several small shrubs, and floral arrangements at the base.
